productDisplayName: Baggit Women Dabang Taj Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 14 cm x 10 cm Crafted from corduroy, leatherette and jute One zippered compartment in the centre A buttonable flap on one side with two slip pockets, four card holders and one pocket A buttonable flap on the back with two slip pockets, three card holders and a zippered slit Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
